eas_text: A civil authority has issued AN ADMINISTRATIVE MESSAGE for the following counties or areas: Maricopa, AZ; at 12:16 AM ON APR 30, 2026 Effective until 08:16 AM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: A Safe Alert has been issued for Cochise County. The Sierra Vista Police Department is looking for 69 year old Julia Gregson.  Julia is a white female, 5 feet 7 inches tall, 130 pounds, with blonde hair and blue eyes and wearing unknown clothing.  Julia was last seen at 6:00 PM on 4/28/26 near the area of Inverrary Dive and East Oak Hill Street in Sierra Vista, Arizona.  She is believed to be driving her silver in color 2015 Subaru Forester bearing an Arizona plate of 86A8VY.  If you have seen Julia, please contact the Sierra Vista Police Department at 520 803 3555 or call 911. If you have contact with this SAFE Alert, please call 911. Monitor TV and Radio for updates.
